{
  "name": "smart-house-mobile",
  "main": "expo-router/entry",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "expo start",
    "start:dev-client": "expo start --dev-client",
    "dev:ios": "expo run:ios",
    "ios": "expo run:ios",
    "ios:device": "expo run:ios --device",
    "ios:device:release": "expo run:ios --device --configuration Release",
    "android": "expo run:android",
    "web": "expo start --web",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "NODE_ENV=test node --import tsx --test src/config/humidifierEntity.test.ts src/ha/mappers/mapBedroomDevices.test.ts src/ha/mappers/mapScenarioSettings.test.ts src/ha/mappers/scenarioLightColor.test.ts src/ha/entityRegistry.test.ts src/domain/scenarioWeeklySchedule.test.ts src/domain/sleepNightWindows.test.ts src/domain/nightSchedule.test.ts src/domain/nowSuggestion.test.ts src/domain/bedroomDeviceControl.test.ts src/domain/nightlightColorPresets.test.ts src/domain/mockRoomPhysics.test.ts src/domain/connectionStatus.test.ts src/ha/mockScriptRunner.test.ts src/ha/mockSleepMaintainer.test.ts src/features/now/lib/parseSunEvent.test.ts src/features/now/lib/interpretState.test.ts src/features/now/lib/shouldShowBedroomSensorSetup.test.ts src/features/settings/lib/devicePickerFilters.test.ts src/features/scenarios/lib/scenarioFieldLabels.test.ts src/features/scenarios/lib/scenarioSettingsSchedule.test.ts src/features/scenarios/lib/useScenarioSettings/prepareScenarioSettings.test.ts src/features/sleep/lib/scoreSleepNight.test.ts src/features/sleep/lib/computeMetricNormPercent.test.ts src/features/sleep/lib/buildSleepMetricChartData.test.ts src/features/sleep/lib/formatSleepWeekRange.test.ts src/features/sleep/lib/formatSleepNightTitle.test.ts src/health/dedupeSleepSegments.test.ts src/health/aggregateWearableNight.test.ts src/health/buildWearableQueryWindow.test.ts src/health/extractTrackerSleepScore.test.ts src/health/scoreWearableSleepQuality.test.ts src/health/computeSleepScore.test.ts src/health/sleepScoreFromSegments.test.ts src/health/buildWearableHistoryWindows.test.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@expo/vector-icons": "^15.0.3",
    "@kingstinct/react-native-healthkit": "^14.0.2",
    "@react-native-community/datetimepicker": "8.4.4",
    "@react-native-community/netinfo": "11.4.1",
    "@react-native-community/slider": "5.0.1",
    "@react-navigation/native": "^7.1.8",
    "@tanstack/react-query": "^5.100.10",
    "expo": "~54.0.33",
    "expo-constants": "~18.0.13",
    "expo-dev-client": "~6.0.21",
    "expo-font": "~14.0.11",
    "expo-linking": "~8.0.11",
    "expo-router": "~6.0.24",
    "expo-secure-store": "~15.0.8",
    "expo-splash-screen": "~31.0.13",
    "expo-status-bar": "~3.0.9",
    "expo-web-browser": "~15.0.10",
    "home-assistant-js-websocket": "^9.6.0",
    "i18next": "^26.2.0",
    "react": "19.1.0",
    "react-dom": "19.1.0",
    "react-i18next": "^17.0.8",
    "react-native": "0.81.5",
    "react-native-nitro-modules": "^0.36.1",
    "react-native-reanimated": "~4.1.1",
    "react-native-safe-area-context": "~5.6.0",
    "react-native-screens": "~4.16.0",
    "react-native-svg": "15.12.1",
    "react-native-web": "~0.21.0",
    "react-native-worklets": "0.5.1",
    "semver": "^7.8.5",

  },
  "devDependencies": {

    "eslint": "^9.39.0",
    "eslint-config-expo": "~10.0.0",
    "react-test-renderer": "19.1.0",

  "private": true
}
